requirement_topic.en: CGES Grid Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz and Utility Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: CGES并网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及电力公司协调
requirement_topic.zht: CGES併網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz 及電力公司協調

summary.en: Montenegro uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage supply. Grid-connected EV charger installations should be coordinated with the Eswatini Electricity Company equivalent operator CGES and with REGAGEN where licensing, tariff, network, or sector approval questions arise. Local utility coordination usually includes load assessment, protection coordination, metering, and site commissioning documentation.
summary.zh: 黑山为230/400 V、50 Hz低压供电。并网 EV 充电桩安装应与 CGES 协调，并在涉及许可、电价、网络或能源监管审批时与 REGAGEN 联动。当地电力协调通常包括负荷评估、保护配合、计量和现场调试文件。
summary.zht: 黑山為230/400 V、50 Hz低壓供電。並網電動汽車充電樁安裝應與 CGES 協調，並在涉及許可、電價、網絡或能源監管審批時與 REGAGEN 聯動。當地電力協調通常包括負荷評估、保護配合、計量和現場調試文件。

standards_or_laws: CGES grid-connection and supply coordination requirements
IEC 61000 series — EMC and power-quality context

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is commonly 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz; Montenegro’s 230/400 V, 50 Hz requires project-level matching of voltage range and utility settings.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据 GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234 接口、GB/T 27930 及当地电网运营商验收文件。中国常见供电为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz，但黑山的230/400 V、50 Hz要求按项目匹配电压范围和电网设置。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據 GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234 介面、GB/T 27930 及當地電網營運商驗收文件。中國常見供電為220 V 單相/380 V 三相、50 Hz，但黑山的230/400 V、50 Hz要求按項目匹配電壓範圍和電網設定。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters should confirm input ratings cover 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, prepare single-line diagrams and load calculations, document harmonic and EMC performance, confirm protective-device coordination, and obtain project-specific CGES and REGAGEN guidance before shipment or activation.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认输入额定值覆盖230 V单相和400 V三相50Hz，针对接入点准备单线图和负荷计算，记录谐波与EMC性能，确认保护器件配合，并在出货或开站前取得项目特定CGES与REGAGEN指导。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認輸入額定值覆蓋230 V 單相和400 V 三相、50 Hz，針對接入點準備單線圖和負荷計算，記錄諧波與 EMC 性能，確認保護器件配合，並在出貨或開站前取得項目特定 CGES 與 REGAGEN 指導。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory project gate: grid-connected installations require CGES supply coordination and may require REGAGEN approval depending on site, tariff, and network impact
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a CGES or REGAGEN substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat CGES grid coordination as a project gate. A China domestic charger package must be checked for 230/400 V, 50 Hz ratings, protection coordination, harmonic and EMC evidence, and project utility requirements before installation in Montenegro.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 CGES 并网协调视为项目门槛。中国国内充电桩资料包在黑山安装前应核查230/400 V、50 Hz 额定值、保护配合、谐波与 EMC 证据，以及项目电网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 CGES 併網協調視為項目門檻。中國國內充電樁資料包在黑山安裝前應核查230/400 V、50 Hz 額定值、保護配合、諧波與 EMC 證據，以及項目電網要求。
